subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou beholdest me prostrate upon the dust, struck down by the effulgence of Thy lights, and bewildered by the vision thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ترانی یا الهی مکبا بوجهی علی التراب صعقا من تجلی الانوار مندهشا من مشاهده
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
